steps.eval: (()=>{const tree=document.querySelector('[data-testid=artifact-tree]'); const w=document.createTreeWalker(tree,NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT); let n; while(n=w.nextNode()){ if((n.textContent||'').trim()==='impl-wave-17-19'){ let p=n.parentElement; while(p&&p!==tree){ if((p.className||'').includes('cursor-pointer')){p.click(); return true;} p=p.parentElement;}}} return false;})()
